# Preface {.unnumbered}

While the project README offers a quick started guide, this document both delivers a deeper treatment of the same topics and covers topics topics that READMEs rarely do.

This document is divided into several parts:

- **Installation.** How to install the project and its pre-requisites.
- **Setup.** How to perform one-time setup to match your surveys.
- **Usage.** How to use on a regular basis.
- **Workflows.** Which workflows are available and how they work.
- **Outputs.** What the outputs project produces and how to use them.
- **Troubleshooting.** What might go wrong and what to do about it.
